from: spu to: backend_category type: N:1 label: '' penwidth: 1.4 - from: spu to: series type: N:1 label: '' - from: spu_attribute_value to: spu type: N:1 label: '' - from: spu_attribute_value to: attribute_def type: N:1 label: '' - from: spu_attribute_value to: attribute_option type: N:1 label: 选项值 - from: spu_image to: spu type: N:1 label: '' - from: standard_sku to: spu type: N:1 label: '' penwidth: 1.4 - from: standard_sku_attribute to: standard_sku type: N:1 label: '' - from: standard_sku_attribute to: attribute_def type: N:1 label: '' - from: standard_sku_attribute to: attribute_option type: N:1 label: 选项值 - from: standard_sku_image to: standard_sku type: N:1 label: '' - from: unit_of_measure to: measurement_dimension type: N:1 label: 归属维度 color: '#1565C0' penwidth: 1.4 - from: measurement_dimension to: unit_of_measure type: '1:1' label: 基准存储单位 color: '#1565C0' penwidth: 1.4 style: dashed - from: attribute_def to: measurement_dimension type: N:1 label: 度量维度 color: '#1565C0' penwidth: 1.4 - from: attribute_allowed_unit to: attribute_def type: N:1 label: 属性 color: '#1565C0' - from: attribute_allowed_unit to: unit_of_measure type: N:1 label: 可用单位 color: '#1565C0' - from: attribute_unit_scope_config to: backend_category type: N:1 label: 类目 color: '#1565C0' - from: attribute_unit_scope_config to: brand type: N:1 label: 品牌 color: '#1565C0' - from: attribute_unit_scope_config to: series type: N:1 label: 系列 color: '#1565C0' - from: attribute_unit_scope_config to: attribute_def type: N:1 label: 属性 color: '#1565C0' - from: attribute_unit_scope_config to: unit_of_measure type: N:1 label: 录入单位 color: '#1565C0' - from: country_display_unit to: measurement_dimension type: N:1 label: 维度 color: '#1565C0' - from: country_display_unit to: backend_category type: N:1 label: 类目（可空） color: '#1565C0' - from: country_display_unit to: unit_of_measure type: N:1 label: 展示单位 color: '#1565C0' penwidth: 1.4 - from: used_item to: standard_sku type: N:1 label: 对应标品SKU color: '#E8833A' penwidth: 1.4 - from: used_item to: warehouse type: N:1 label: 所在仓 color: '#E8833A' - from: item_condition to: used_item type: N:1 label: 质检明细 color: '#E8833A' - from: used_item_attribute_value to: used_item type: N:1 label: '' color: '#E8833A' - from: used_item_attribute_value to: attribute_def type: N:1 label: 属性 - from: used_item_attribute_value to: attribute_option type: N:1 label: 选项值 - from: listing to: used_item type: N:1 label: 一物多渠道 color: '#C0392B' penwidth: 1.4 - from: listing to: channel type: N:1 label: 渠道 color: '#C0392B' - from: size_system_category to: size_system type: N:1 label: 体系 color: '#6A1B9A' - from: size_system_category to: backend_category type: N:1 label: 类目 color: '#6A1B9A' - from: size_value to: size_system type: N:1 label: '' color: '#6A1B9A' penwidth: 1.4 - from: size_conversion to: size_value type: N:1 label: 源值 color: '#6A1B9A' - from: size_conversion to: size_value type: N:1 label: 目标值 color: '#6A1B9A' - from: brand_size_system to: brand type: '1:1' label: 品牌 color: '#6A1B9A' penwidth: 1.4 - from: brand_size_system_category to: brand_size_system type: N:1 label: 品牌体系 color: '#6A1B9A' - from: brand_size_system_category to: backend_category type: N:1 label: 类目 color: '#6A1B9A' - from: brand_size_value to: brand_size_system type: N:1 label: '' color: '#6A1B9A' penwidth: 1.4 - from: brand_size_mapping to: brand_size_value type: N:1 label: 品牌值 color: '#6A1B9A' - from: brand_size_mapping to: size_value type: N:1 label: 标准值 color: '#6A1B9A' penwidth: 1.4 - from: attribute_size_system_scope_config to: backend_category type: N:1 label: 类目 color: '#6A1B9A' - from: attribute_size_system_scope_config to: brand type: N:1 label: 品牌 color: '#6A1B9A' - from: attribute_size_system_scope_config to: series type: N:1 label: 系列 color: '#6A1B9A' - from: attribute_size_system_scope_config to: attribute_def type: N:1 label: 属性 color: '#6A1B9A' - from: attribute_size_system_scope_config to: size_system type: N:1 label: 尺码体系 color: '#6A1B9A' penwidth: 1.4 design_rules: unit_storage_rule: 同维度所有属性统一按 measurement_dimension.base_unit_id 指定的单位存储，attribute_def 不再冗余存储单位字段 unit_conversion: unit_of_measure.to_base_factor 用于将任意单位换算到基准单位。例如 inch->mm 系数为 25.4 unit_scope_config: attribute_unit_scope_config 控制运营录入时可用单位（类目/品牌/系列维度），不涉及前端展示。前端展示单位由 country_display_unit 控制 country_display_unit: 前端展示单位配置：country_display_unit 表通过 category_id 可空实现兜底逻辑。category_id 为空=国家×维度默认，不为空=类目级覆盖。查询时先查类目级（country+dimension+category），没有则查国家级默认（country+dimension+category=null）。本期 country_code 写死 US attribute_value_split: spu_attribute_value 和 standard_sku_attribute 的属性值按类型分存：text_value（文本）、numeric_value（数值，按基准单位存储）、option_id（枚举选项） three_layer_model: 标品层（厂商定义不可改）→ 二手商品层（一物一码独立状态）→ 渠道层（多渠道分发独立控价） value_level_rule: attribute_scope_config.value_level 控制属性值存储层级（SPU/SKU/ITEM）。约束：key 属性→必须 SPU，sale 属性→必须 SKU，non_key 属性→灵活（SPU/SKU/ITEM 均可）。value_level=ITEM 的属性值存储在 used_item_attribute_value 表 size_system_rule: 标准尺码体系：一个体系可适用多个类目（通过 size_system_category 中间表）。换算关系存一条双向隐含（查询时 source 和 target 都匹配） brand_size_rule: 品牌尺码体系：与 brand 1:1（brand_id 唯一），适用类目通过 brand_size_system_category 中间表多选。品牌尺码值通过 brand_size_mapping 映射到标准尺码值 size_priority_rule: 商品发布时尺码体系优先级：优先匹配品牌专属尺码体系，无品牌体系则使用 attribute_size_system_scope_config 配置的标准体系 size_scope_config_rule: attribute_size_system_scope_config 按作用域（类目/类目×品牌/类目×系列）差异化配置属性支持的尺码体系，与 attribute_scope_config 同模式
